purpose: Preferences window content. Hosts INPUT/OUTPUT device combos, a custom paint-based AUDIO CHAIN list (drag-reorder + per-row bypass checkbox + Edit button + right-click delete), DEVICE SETTINGS (API/sample rate/buffer size), and a single Apply button that commits everything atomically via callAsync.
invariants: Chain mutations (drag-reorder, right-click delete, checkbox toggle, + Add Plugin) only update local state (chainList.items / chainList.bypassed) and trigger onChange — nothing persists until commitAllSettings runs onApply on the message thread.
deviceManager.addChangeListener is called exactly once in the ctor and removeChangeListener once in the dtor; mismatched pairs leak the listener.
AudioChainListComponent height tracks max(viewport height, items * kRowHeight) — updateChainListHeight must be called after any items change to keep the scroll area sized correctly.
gotchas: commitAllSettings disables the Apply button, then defers the actual device restart to MessageManager::callAsync — this is required so the disabled-state repaint runs before the message thread is blocked by setAudioDeviceSetup.
showAddPluginMenu re-sorts knownPlugins.getTypes() on every popup open; fine for typical plugin counts but noticeable with hundreds of scanned plugins.

AudioChainListComponent is fully paint-based, not built from JUCE Buttons/Checkboxes — Edit-button, checkbox, and drag-handle hit-testing is geometry math against getCheckboxArea/getEditButtonArea and the row's right-edge handle strip.
Drag-and-drop reorder math accounts for self-insertion: when insertAt > dragSourceRow the adjusted target is insertAt - 1 (the source row has already been erased).
Combo-box rebuilds (rebuildDeviceCombos and friends) use juce::dontSendNotification on every setSelectedId/clear to avoid kicking off device restarts during UI population.
Plugin identity for staged-active comparison is fileOrIdentifier + pluginFormatName + name — must stay consistent with IconMenu::applyPluginChain's identity lambda or the diff misclassifies entries.
